inventory.selection: top eligible task150-400 members by maximum Einsum operand count

algebraic_proof.proof: Every occurrence of the target constant is an Einsum operand. Substituting its elementwise-identical contraction into that term preserves the Einstein sum for every real value of every other operand.

retained_terminal_evidence.reason: Threshold outputs were identical and correct in the retained dual-ORT probe, but a 58-input Einsum violates the no-giant-contraction gate and raw positive values in (0,0.25) violate the margin gate. A larger run was stopped once those terminal failures were confirmed.
retained_terminal_evidence.gate_failure: near-positive values are present; full four-config rerun is unnecessary for a terminally rejected non-winner
